clauses.statement: A Markdown destination beginning with docs/ is projected as a canonical GitHub blob URL, or a raw URL for images.
A prose docs link is normalized while inline_code, fenced_code, and non-docs destinations remain unchanged.
English and Japanese release history and CHANGELOG receive the same normalized idempotent note.

diagrams.title: Release note projection boundary
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  PR[PR Release Notes] --> Escape[HTML and Vue escape]
  Escape --> Normalize[docs link normalization]
  Normalize --> EN[English release]
  Normalize --> JA[Japanese release]
  Normalize --> Changelog[CHANGELOG]

diagrams.title: Markdown segment handling
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Prose
  Prose --> Normalized: destination starts docs/
  Prose --> Prose: other destination
  Prose --> InlineCode: backtick
  InlineCode --> Prose: backtick
  Prose --> FencedCode: fence open
  FencedCode --> Prose: fence close
